known_gaps: ROM hook rule coverage is dynamic execution coverage; score-delta coverage is tracked separately because many executed rules leave scores unchanged.
Generated scenario coverage is currently ROM-score-simulator coverage, not PyBoy materialized-state coverage.
PyBoy trace hooks are execution hooks with configured public-input snapshots, not CPU memory-read watchpoints.

known_limits: Trace events are captured by PyBoy execution hooks, not by an in-ROM WRAM ring buffer.
Score events record score helper deltas and source labels, while rule entries record dynamic rule-label execution.
Predicate branch entries record selected executable public-info branch labels and configured outcomes.
Public-read probe entries record legal-input snapshots at configured executable labels; they are not CPU memory-read watchpoints.
Trace events are captured by PyBoy execution hooks, not by an in-ROM WRAM ring buffer.
